---
title: "Course Website"
toc: false
---

# WEEN 2025 - Integrating Large Language Model tools to our R workflows

All slides and materials live here.This one-day online course is organized by Physalia courses in conjunction with the The Wales Ecology & Evolution Network (WEEN) Conference on Monday, 24th November (the Monday following the conference).

This site may be updated after the course to correct any issues, or to add links or interesting topics discussed during the day.


Instructor: Luis D. Verde Arregoitia  

<span class='code'>📆 &ensp; 24 November, 2025</span>\
<span class='code'>⏰ &ensp; 13:00-18:00 (Berlin Time)</span>\
